summary: Frontend-only regression run after bug-fix iteration on Frenny Sheth portfolio (Contact links, Hobbies content, Hobbies photo collage z-index, Hero masthead). All 8 verification points PASSED.

verification_results.contact_linkedin: PASS — href=https://www.linkedin.com/in/frenny-sheth-6a972a1a9, target=_blank, click opened new tab to that exact URL
verification_results.contact_behance: PASS — href=https://www.behance.net/frennysheth, target=_blank, click opened new tab
verification_results.contact_resume: PASS — href ends in .pdf (customer-assets...z61e013t_Frenny_Sheth_CV_new.pdf), target=_blank, download attribute present, click opened new tab
verification_results.photo_collage_zindex: PASS — Frenny self-portrait (w2vz3omq) z-index=40 in front of books polaroid z-index=10 (coffee=20, film=10)
verification_results.hero_polaroids: PASS — All 3 keys present (rabnkos2, schg7m4n, n4zp4moa)
verification_results.hero_masthead: PASS — 'The Frenny Journal' and 'Ahmedabad · India' both visible; 'Issue 24' = 0 occurrences
verification_results.overlay_block_check: PASS — No fixed custom-cursor elements detected; elementFromPoint at LinkedIn link center returns the <a data-testid='contact-linkedin'> itself (no overlay intercepting clicks)

notes: The substring 'Vancouver' is present once in the page — but it lives in the Education section ('Lemon Logic Studio · Vancouver, Canada · Internship'), NOT in the Hero masthead. Masthead correctly reads 'Ahmedabad · India'. This is expected per portfolio.js content and not a regression.
contact-email-link does not have target='_blank' (mailto links typically don't need it). Request only required href=mailto:ux.frenny@gmail.com — verified.
Lenis smooth-scroll did not interfere with clicks. Custom cursor (if present) has pointer-events:none and is not blocking link clicks.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx (~243 lines) — clean, all 4 sidebar links use proper <a> with target/rel/download as appropriate. No issues.
Hobbies.jsx — z-index hierarchy is explicit (z-10/z-20/z-40) and verified at runtime. Good.
Minor (non-blocking): the Polaroid containing div uses Tailwind utility classes (z-10/z-20/z-40) which compile to numeric z-index — works as expected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Contact link bug fixes are verified working in the live preview (LinkedIn, Behance, Resume all open new tabs on click; mailto correct). Hobby text content and Funfact updated. Photo collage z-index ordering correct (Frenny front, books behind). Hero masthead is 'The Frenny Journal' / 'Ahmedabad · India'. 'Vancouver' string still exists in Education timeline (Lemon Logic Studio internship) which is intentional content — do not flag.
rca of the issue: Previous bug report ('links not working for linkedin/behance/resume') has been resolved by main agent: links now render as proper <a> tags with explicit target='_blank', rel='noopener noreferrer', cursor-pointer, and (for resume) download attribute. No overlay (custom cursor / Lenis smooth-scroll wrapper) is intercepting pointer events at the link coordinates — verified via elementFromPoint.
